name: pilot-core
description: Shared governance for full-stack Microsoft projects: stack detection and scaffolding, /fsp-bootstrap baseline scaffolding gated ahead of feature work, security pipelines (/fsp-init, /fsp-audit, /fsp-fix, /fsp-learn), autonomous delivery team (/fsp-architect, /fsp-build), MCP discovery, supply-chain and license policy, CI secret scanning, REST API standards, @fullstack-reviewer/@fullstack-implementor/@fullstack-support trio, /fsp-checkpoint, /fsp-verify, /fsp-health

strict_style_hooks.title: Enable style advisory hooks
strict_style_hooks.description: When false, advisory (warn) hook patterns are suppressed entirely. Security deny-patterns are never suppressed regardless of this setting.

org_prefix.title: Organisation prefix
org_prefix.description: Optional organisation prefix for naming conventions and scaffolded project names (e.g. "acme").

severity_floor.title: Auto-fix severity floor
severity_floor.description: Minimum finding severity /fsp-fix will auto-remediate (P0, P1, P2, P3). Findings below this floor are reported but not automatically fixed.

enable_governance_hooks.title: Enable governance hooks
enable_governance_hooks.description: When false, disables the SessionStart staleness check, PreCompact findings snapshot, PostToolUseFailure triage hints, and Setup CI gate. Security deny-patterns are never affected by this setting.
